nasb.text: “If a man borrows anything from his neighbor, and it is injured or dies while its owner is not with it, he shall make full restitution.

esv.text: “If a man borrows anything of his neighbor, and it is injured or dies, the owner not being with it, he shall make full restitution.

cnv.text: “如果人向鄰舍借甚麼，所借的無論是受了傷，或是死了，物主不在場，借的人就必須償還。

ccb.text: 倘若有人向邻居借牲畜，牲畜受伤或死掉，而当时物主不在场，借的人就要赔偿。
